strengths: Excellent heading structure with keyword targeting

common_themes: Key destinations: Bangkok, Phuket, Koh Samui, Khao Lak
content_gaps: Visa and entry requirements (only Lidl touches briefly in FAQ)
Health and safety: vaccinations, travel insurance, safety tips
Budget breakdown / cost of living on the ground
Insider tips / off-the-beaten-path destinations (Koh Lipe, Koh Chang, Koh Kood)
Family-specific practical advice (child-friendliness, kid activities, medical facilities)
Comparison: Thailand vs. other SE Asian destinations
Food and culinary experiences as travel motivator
opportunities: Combine Lidl's editorial depth (3,500+ words) with Urlaubsguru's structured headings and persona segmentation
Build robust FAQ (10-15 questions) covering visa, health, budget, family, safety
Persona-driven sections: families, couples, adventure seekers, culture enthusiasts
Practical travel guide elements: entry requirements, health, transport, currency, etiquette
Regional deep-dives beyond Bangkok/Phuket/Koh Samui trifecta
Seasonal planning matrix mapping regions to months
Leverage DERTOUR brand authority with expert recommendations and editorial voice
